holdings.infoBox: OMFS is an equity ETF with a total of 1103 individual holdings. The top holdings are Indivior stock at 1.88%, Sterling Infrastructure at 1.82%, Argan at 1.59%, Nextpower at 1.55%, and Arrowhead Pharmaceuticals at 1.36%.

overview.description: The Invesco Russell 2000 Dynamic Multifactor ETF (OMFS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund tracks an index of US small-cap stocks selected by five investment factors, which are weighted based on current macroeconomic conditions. OMFS was launched on Nov 8, 2017 and is issued by Invesco.
